cadence_note: Frozen archive — no ongoing publication schedule. Dartmouth ceased updating the Atlas in 2024; the longitudinal research files under data.dartmouthatlas.org/downloads/research_files/ end at data year 2019 (hospital research files at vintage 2017) and have carried unchanged Last-Modified headers since 2021-2022. Refreshed yearly only to detect an unannounced republication; the whole corpus is well under 50MB, so a full re-fetch is cheap.
